title: Cobblemon Expeditions
description: Take off on a brand new Expedition in Cobblemon 1.7!
body:
# **Welcome to the Cobblemon Expedition!**

**Cobblemon Expeditions** is a modpack focused on strengthening you and your Cobblemons bond to truely depend on each other while you find your way on your own Expedition! 

Through the use of mods like Cobbleworkers allowing you and your Cobblemon to do regular tasks together. Accompanied with the Let's Do farming mods the more sit down and relax playstyle has a ton to explore! With a few work-in-progress questlines and planned to be more/expanded on, a fully voiced custom tutorial, LevelZ to level your skills to the max and unlock all you can, or completing tasks in the Research Book, you'll have an extra something to work towards!

If you're a diehard battler don't worry I have you covered! Fight Cobblemon the old fashion way with Fight or Flight! This allows Cobblemon to be aggressive towards you and possibly attack unprovoked! So send your Cobblemon to defend you in battle! ranging from the normal turn based to you and your Cobblemon fighting to survive! Legendaries and specific Cobblemon themed Trials and Dungeons are also present so you can scratch the itch of finding the most powerful Cobblemon in the pack! And even when those seem like enough, Raid Dens are naturally spawn in the overworld! Allowing you to battle raids in groups and try to catch the Cobblemon trapped inside!

**[Reccomended RAM: 8000MB]**

**The Official Cobblemon Expeditions Trailer!**
